message:
test(fuzz): EncodingDecision::for_payload Direct/Chunked branch (1gi9z)

Add fuzz_encoding_decision_for_payload covering the Direct/Chunked
decision boundary in fcp_raptorq::EncodingDecision::for_payload
(encode.rs:281). Existing raptorq_roundtrip exercises the encoder +
decoder loop but not this decision. Properties: empty payload →
Direct with no symbols; oversized → PayloadTooLarge with size +
max preserved; requires_chunking agreement; complementary
is_direct/is_chunked; Direct.transmission_info.symbol_size matches
config; Chunked manifest invariants (chunk_count == chunks.len(),
total_len == payload.len, verify_hash, reconstruct yields original);
discriminant determinism. Once-gated anchors verify each branch on
empty / threshold-1 / exactly-threshold (still Direct since
requires_chunking is strict greater-than) / threshold+1 / oversized.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.7 (1M context) <noreply@anthropic.com>

files.patch:
@@ -1042,5 +1042,12 @@ test = false
 doc = false
 bench = false
 
+[[bin]]
+name = "fuzz_encoding_decision_for_payload"
+path = "fuzz_targets/encoding_decision_for_payload.rs"
+test = false
+doc = false
+bench = false
+
 [workspace]
 members = ["."]
